name: BREAD FINANCIAL HOLDINGS, INC.
business: Bread Financial Holdings, Inc. provides payment, lending, and saving solutions to U.S. consumers through co-brand and private label credit cards, direct-to-consumer credit cards, installment loans, split-pay offerings, and savings products. Its partner base includes large consumer brands such as AAA, Academy Sports + Outdoors, Caesars, Dell Technologies, Hard Rock International, the NFL, Raymour & Flanigan, Saks Fifth Avenue, Signet, Ulta, and Victoria's Secret, as well as small- and medium-sized businesses. The company operates as a single reportable segment with primary revenue from interest and fees on loans.
sellsTo: U.S. consumers across generations (Gen Z, Millennial, Gen X, Baby Boomers)

exposures.sentence: We are a tech-forward financial services company that provides simple, personalized payment, lending, and saving solutions to millions of U.S. consumers.
We continue to invest in AI capabilities, technology modernization, marketing, and product innovation to drive growth and efficiencies.

We cannot guarantee, however, that our cybersecurity risk management program and processes, or those of our third-party service providers, including our policies, controls or procedures, will be fully implemented, adhered to, or effective in protecting both our customers and our own information and technology from cyberattacks.

catalysts.event: Merger of Comenity Bank (CB) with and into Comenity Capital Bank (CCB)
catalysts.sentence: Pending regulatory approval and the expiration of any applicable waiting periods, the merger of CB and CCB is expected to occur in the second half of 2026.
